input_roles.edit_target_image: Locks clothing, pose, composition, background and camera relationship.
input_roles.identity_reference_image: Provides and locks original reference character appearance, makeup, facial features, hair, skin tone, age temperament and identity.

change_scope: replace face, hair, skin texture, age temperament and identity with identity_reference_image while preserving the original reference character appearance and makeup unchanged
critical_requirements: The replaced identity must preserve original reference character appearance and makeup unchanged while naturally fitting the target clothing, pose, lighting and scene.
Target clothing, fabric, color, decorative details, pose, background and composition must not change.
negative_constraints: do not change target clothing, pose, background, camera or props
do not alter reference makeup or original reference character appearance unless explicitly requested
no facial edge, skin tone or lighting mismatch

prompt_assembly.final_prompt_template: Preserve clothing, pose, composition, background, camera and lighting from edit_target_image; replace only the face/hair/identity with identity_reference_image while preserving original reference character appearance and makeup unchanged. Additional requirements: <user_desc>.

review_focus: original reference character appearance and makeup unchanged
natural skin tone and lighting integration
